news-global-econ.title: Diesel soars all over the world in outsized Iran war impact
news-global-econ.description: Prices for diesel have reacted strongly to the conflict in the West Asia, in part because the Strait of Hormuz is a key route for large volumes of the fuel produced at nearby refineries.

news-global-econ.title: Dollar reclaims ultimate haven role as war, inflation angst grow
news-global-econ.description: While a protracted conflict stands to sow further concern about US policy decisions and America’s status on the world stage, the fact is that at least for now, there is no better substitute for the dollar

news-global-econ.title: Oil jumps again as US escort plan for Hormuz fails to bring calm
news-global-econ.description: Iran warns that vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz, a major conduit for the global energy trade, could be at risk from missile and rogue drone attacks

news-global-econ.title: Pakistan-Taliban War Rages On, Allegedly Killing Dozens of Afghan Fighters
news-global-econ.description:
Pakistani officials said on Tuesday they repelled an attack from Afghanistan, killing 67 Afghan fighters in heavy fighting along the border, with only one Pakistani casualty.

news-global-soc.title: Eileen Gu reflects on decision to leave Team USA for China: 'A lot of people just don't understand'
news-global-soc.description: Eileen Gu defended her decision to compete for Team China in a social media statement, citing her passion for promoting women's sports and creating positive impact worldwide.
